string.text: %c[54,199,169,96]I lost sight of you! Come back to me!
%c[54,199,169,96]Okay, I see you. Let's keep moving. Just don't go too far!
%c[54,199,169,96]Looks like we're done here. Search the bodies — we need all the supplies we can get.
%c[255,220,20,60]SOS, SOS! Is anyone out there? Stalkers, respond! I need help! I'm being chased, anyone nearby, help me... Sending you my coordinates.
%c[54,199,169,96]It's dangerous here, Beast. We need to stick together! Come back to me!
%c[54,199,169,96]Let’s keep going. Just don’t run off too far!
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, I opened Scavenger’s stash container — there’s quite a bit of stuff in here. I can share some with you. Come over, I’m waiting.
%c[255,220,20,60]Merc, I’m out of ammo — can’t provide fire support.
%c[255,220,20,60]Nice work, merc. Head back to base with Moskit — don’t wait for me.
%c[255,220,20,60]Damn it, those freaks got Moskit...
%c[255,220,20,60]Lutiy, the zombified ones are already on the hill... If we don’t stop them, they’ll reach the shed soon.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, I need to talk to you. Come over here.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, I see you handled it with the guys even without me. Head back to base, I’ll be returning too. Sledge and Snake will bring the meat themselves.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, I picked up some signal near the shed. You’re nearby — check it out and see what’s going on.

%c[255,220,20,60]Good job, Beast! Your assault distracted Tesak and gave us the upper hand. We captured a few mercs, but Tesak and the rest got away. Anyway, get over here — Lutiy wants to talk to you.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, I’ve got something to discuss. Come see me!
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, there’s something strange going on in the underground. Come see me!
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, swing by for a canteen. I purified the water.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, I need your help. Come over!
%c[255,220,20,60]Merc, where the hell are you? I’m sick of waiting — get over here.
%c[255,220,20,60]Congratulations, you’ve just completed this part of the storyline. To be continued — stay tuned for the next update.
PROFFESIONAL (Developer):
%c[54,199,169,96]It’s dangerous here, merc. Come back to me!
%c[54,199,169,96]Let’s keep going, merc. Just don’t stray too far!
%c[54,199,169,96]Merc, where are you? Hurry up, we need to find the psy-dog.
%c[54,199,169,96]Merc, let’s keep moving. Just try not to fall behind!
%c[255,220,20,60]Mercs, I assume you're here for Sidorovich, but he can't see you right now. Come to me — I need to talk to your leader.
%c[255,220,20,60]Oh, the beacon is working! Hang on, I’ll try to locate Klim’s PDA signal. I’ll let you know as soon as I find it.
%c[255,220,20,60]Merc, I picked up his signal — he’s not far from you, along with an unknown one. I’m sending you the coordinates now.
%c[255,220,20,60]Attention: 5% discount on all goods. All interested — come to my bunker.
%c[255,220,20,60]Stock updated — stop by.
%c[255,220,20,60]Buying artifacts at a good price — come see me.
%c[54,199,169,96]Raven, I’m heading out to check a location for Wolf. Stay in the village and ask around about our business.
%c[54,199,169,96]Raven, stay in the village for now. Try to find out anything about our recent visitors. Your help isn’t needed just yet.
%c[54,199,169,96]Raven, the military have a hit contract for us. The target is the Neutral base leader — Father Valerian. I’ll come later to discuss the details with you.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, Jackal sent mercs to guard the trader’s bunker. Should I send them in?
%c[54,199,169,96]You can send the mercs to Sidorovich — and check if he paid for them while you're at it.
%c[255,220,20,60]Understood. On it right now.
%c[54,199,169,96]Grif, send Bison to the railway bridge. Have him watch the farm — make sure Valerian doesn’t leave without us knowing.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, the mercs for guarding the Bar have arrived.
%c[255,220,20,60]Alright, I’ll notify Bison now.
%c[54,199,169,96]Lieutenant, this is Beast — contract complete.
%c[54,199,169,96]Raven, get rid of the bodies and return to the ATP. I’ll go to the military to collect the reward.
%c[255,220,20,60]Excellent. I’ll be waiting at the same spot in the morning.
%c[255,220,20,60]Neutrals at the base just executed a stalker. Immediately after, Father Valerian left the base with a group of four and headed toward the tunnel into the Dark Valley.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, Mракобес just arrived at the Cordon. He’s at the ATP and asked to see you — says it’s a personal matter.
%c[255,220,20,60]Merc, I heard you came across some valuable intel. Come by — I’ll pay well.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, someone’s looking for you. Come by when you can.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, I’m ready to pay off the debt — drop by when you have time.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, I need to talk to you. Come by.
%c[255,220,20,60]Merc, come see me — I’ve got a task for you.
%c[255,220,20,60]Merc, where’ve you gone? Come by — I’ve got work for you.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, I’ve got good news for you. Come by when you have a moment.
%c[255,220,20,60]Merc, your daily bed rental has expired. You can renew it with me.
%c[255,220,20,60]Hey guys, looks like someone wasn’t taught not to steal. Maybe it’s time for a little lesson…
%c[255,220,20,60]Guys, do you read?..
%c[255,220,20,60]Anyone alive in there? Answer me!
%c[255,220,20,60]Merc, stay back — this is stalker territory.
%c[255,220,20,60]Don’t come closer — we will open fire.
%c[255,220,20,60]Move along — the trader put in a good word for you.
%c[255,220,20,60]Hey, merc, I see they’ve let you out already. Come see me — we need to talk. Urgently!
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, drop by when you’ve got a minute — I’ve got a job for you.
%c[255,220,20,60]Hey, man, come here — I’ve got something to discuss. Just put your weapon away!
Bandit:
%c[255,220,20,60]Eyes open — they could show up any minute.
%c[255,220,20,60]Enemy spotted, get ready for a fight.
%c[255,220,20,60]We’ve been spotted — time for some action.
%c[255,220,20,60]Shit, they see us!
%c[255,220,20,60]Thanks, merc — without you, we’d be toast. We’ve prepared your reward back at our base.
%c[255,220,20,60]Maybe no one will show, but check your weapons just in case.
%c[255,220,20,60]We’re all set — waiting on your command.
%c[255,220,20,60]Come in, Beast! Miklukha here, Freedom squad leader at the Outpost. Come see me — got a million-dollar job for you. Sending you my coordinates!
%c[255,220,20,60]Ambush! Miklukha, it’s an ambush!
%c[255,220,20,60]Hey, merc, your guns have arrived. Shmyga’s waiting for you — make sure you’re not being followed.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, where’ve you been? Come see me — something’s happened.
%c[255,220,20,60]Beast, the shipment with the suits has arrived. I’m waiting for you here.
%c[255,220,20,60]Servant of Monolith, we are glad to see you among us! Come to me — I wish to speak with you.
%c[255,220,20,60]Alert! The diggers' station is under attack… Oh God, get away from me!..
Item received:
New additional objective:
Additional objective failed:
Additional objective completed:
%c[default]Talk to the soldier
%c[default]Talk to Snake
%c[default]Talk to Grif
%c[default]Tell Stavrid about the bandits’ plan
%c[default]Ask the stalkers at the farm about the SR-3 Vikhir
